name: GitHub Weekly Dev Summary — n8n + Claude

parameters.name: system
messages

parameters.content:
## Workflow Acceptance Criteria
✅ Exportable .json (importable into n8n)
✅ Trigger: Weekly cron — Friday 5PM (0 17 * * 5)
✅ Fetches: commits, closed issues, merged PRs for the week
✅ Calls: Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-20250514)
✅ Delivers: Discord webhook
✅ Configurable: GitHub repo, Discord webhook, language (EN/FR)
